text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 110 

GAP_INP_1M_COPAY_TIER_05 

LABEL: Coverage Gap In-Network Pharmacy Copay for 1-month Supply on Tier 5 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the dollar amount of the beneficiary copayment for a 1-month supply of the 
drugs on this tier, using an in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) 
during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

Applies
